summary: There is no available scientific literature indicating that ASF1 is phosphorylated by Tousled-like kinases; neither ASF1 nor these kinases are mentioned in any of the reviewed studies focusing on protein phosphorylation mechanisms. The absence of direct references suggests this specific biochemical relationship has not been established experimentally.
